description_long: This sculpture depicts a haunting, abstract figure draped in tattered, flowing robes, with a skeletal face partially emerging from the folds. The form is highly textured, with deep creases and undulating surfaces that evoke the sense of weathered stone or aged fabric. The figure stands upright on a rough, rectangular base, which appears to be made of the same material as the sculpture itself. The front view reveals the most detail, with the skull-like visage and hollow eye sockets peering out from beneath a heavy hood. The back and sides are less defined, dominated by the swirling, layered drapery that wraps around the form. The overall color palette is muted, with shades of gray and blue giving the piece a somber, ghostly presence.
description: A ghostly, abstract sculpture of a skeletal figure shrouded in tattered robes, standing on a rough rectangular base. The surface is highly textured with deep folds and a muted gray-blue color palette.
description_view_0: The front view shows the skeletal face and hollow eyes emerging from the draped hood, with the most detailed folds and textures visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the swirling, layered drapery with no visible face, emphasizing the abstract, flowing form.
description_view_2: The back view is dominated by the cascading folds of the robe, with no discernible facial features, giving a sense of movement and depth.
description_view_3: The right side view partially reveals the skull-like face beneath the hood, with the drapery wrapping around the figure and pooling at the base.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract skeletal figure in draped robes
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is shown on a rough, rectangular base, suggesting it is intended for outdoor installation, possibly in a park, plaza, or urban sidewalk.
